### Why Traditional Coding Tests Miss the Mark

Most coding assessments test for syntax or algorithms in isolation. But today’s top developers do more — they use AI, collaborate smartly, and deliver functional products at speed. 
‍ 
The Vibe Coder Assessment measures how well someone codes in the flow, solving real-world challenges, integrating AI, and getting things done.

&

30+ teams use WeCP

.webp)

### What Makes Vibe Coder Assessment Different?

Real-World Tasks

Candidates work on projects that mimic real development challenges — shipping usable features, not just code snippets.

AI-Assisted Coding

We test how coders leverage AI tools (like GitHub Copilot or ChatGPT) to move faster without sacrificing quality.

Speed + Impact

Time is money. See how candidates balance speed, clarity, and execution.

Instant Insights

Get an easy-to-understand report that highlights not just coding ability but development mindset.

## For Teams Who Need Doers, Not Just Coders

### Hiring a developer?

Step 1

Choose your role and challenge type.

Step 2

Step 3

Step 4

# Frequently ASked Questions

## FAQs

Everything you need to know about the product and functionality. Can’t find the answer you’re looking for? Please chat to our team.

What is Vibe Coder Assessment and how is it different from traditional coding assessments?

Vibe Coder Assessment evaluates how candidates solve problems using natural language prompts with AI agents. Instead of writing every line manually, candidates guide AI to build, test, and refine code—just like they do in today’s AI-assisted workflows.

Can Vibe Coder Assessment still measure real developer skills?

Absolutely. Vibe Coder Assessment doesn't replace skill evaluation—it modernizes it. The assessment focuses on how candidates approach problems, structure logic, evaluate outputs, and iterate—all critical skills in today’s AI-powered development environments.

How do you ensure assessment integrity with AI involved?

Vibe Coder Assessment includes guardrails like prompt logging, test case validation, AI output tracking, and time-based interaction records to ensure authenticity while preserving a realistic, developer-friendly experience.

Is Vibe Coder Assessment suitable for junior or early-career developers?

Yes. The format is intuitive and mirrors how most developers are already experimenting with AI tools. It levels the playing field by assessing problem-solving strategy and adaptability over memorized syntax.

How does this help us hire faster or better?

By simulating real coding scenarios with AI, Vibe Vibe Coder Assessment how candidates think, adapt, and solve—without the drag of long take-home assignments or manual code reviews. You get deeper insight, faster.
